home.description: Find a group to split-buy the Nijigasaki tokuten set. Share a ¥21,600 set among up to 12 fans.

browse.title: Browse
browse.description: Find open parties looking for members. Filter by language.

join.title: Join
join.description: Join a party and connect with other fans via group chat.

discuss.title: Discuss
discuss.description: Talk with your party about who wants which character.

record.title: Claim
record.description: Record your character preferences and lock in your pick.

partyList.empty: No parties found. Create one to get started!
